thesis_bull: Deterministic signal evaluator at EOD reproduces CSCO as ENTRY (rank 3/21, 6m return +25.97%, SPY trend filter passed). pre_close routine at 19:36Z closed the existing CSCO position (+$618.90 realized) for asymmetric overnight earnings risk; if the Q3 FY26 print clears without a major gap-down, the momentum signal would normally drive a re-entry on the next close.
thesis_bear: Three reasons the re-entry is wrong at this EOD: (a) circuit-breaker state OUT throttles new opens to qty=0; (b) the earnings catalyst that justified today's close is still hours away (AMC, conference call 4:30 PM ET) — re-opening before the print is exactly the asymmetric exposure pre_close existed to refuse; (c) daily-bar data staleness 19 days breaches max_data_staleness_seconds=60. The pre_close commentary explicitly anticipated re-entry on 2026-05-14 EOD after the print resolves, not on the same-day EOD.
invalidation_condition: All three gates clear: CB returns to FULL/HALF (throttle > 0), the CSCO earnings event has resolved (post-print on 2026-05-14), and daily-bar data freshness is within max_data_staleness_seconds. Until then, no re-entry. If CSCO gaps down >10% on the print and falls out of the top-7 buffer on the 2026-05-14 EOD signal, the strategy may permanently EXIT this name rather than re-enter.

position_size.sizing_basis: Strategy B target 6% ≈ $5,974 at quote $96.36 → 62 shares; throttled to 0 by CB OUT and overruled by earnings-window policy anyway.

confidence_notes: Lower than AMZN (0.55) because re-opening into an unresolved earnings event tonight would be procedurally inconsistent with the close we just executed at pre_close. Even if CB were FULL, the earnings-window prohibition implied by `holding_earnings_caution_window_days = 1` in strategy_rules and by pre_close.md's overnight-risk overlay would push this to NO_TRADE.
risk_manager_notes: NO_TRADE reduces no risk; APPROVED. Were this a PAPER_BUY: REJECTED on three grounds — (1) CB OUT throttle=0.0; (2) data staleness 19 days >> 60s cap; (3) holding_earnings_caution_window_days=1 against tonight's Q3 FY26 print. Each is individually disqualifying.
compliance_notes: CSCO on watchlist with approved_for_paper_trading=true; large_cap_momentum_top5 active; mode permits the decision class. NO_TRADE is recorded so the audit trail shows the system saw the signal and refused on policy. Schema-compliant.

data_provenance.earnings_catalyst: CSCO Q3 FY26 AMC 2026-05-13; pre_close decision file decisions/2026-05-13/1536_CSCO.json closed the prior position
